translation.en: I will definitely arrive on time.

exampleSentencesTranslated: He is not certain about the plan for this weekend.
She will certain check the information before sending the email.
You need to be certain that you locked the door before going out.

example.en: I am sure that I will arrive on time.
example.vi: Tôi chắc chắn rằng mình sẽ đến đúng giờ.

definitions.en: Expressing complete certainty about something; without doubt.
definitions.vi: Diễn tả sự tin tưởng tuyệt đối vào điều gì đó; không nghi ngờ.

notes:
chắc chắn = certain, sure, confident something is true or will happen.  

It’s an adjective and can describe a person (feeling sure) or a situation (being certain). It also works like an adverb to strengthen a statement, meaning “definitely.”  

Close synonym: chắc (more casual, shorter). Opposite idea: không chắc / không chắc chắn (not sure).
exampleSentences: Anh chưa chắc chắn về kế hoạch cuối tuần này đâu.
Chị sẽ chắc chắn kiểm tra lại thông tin trước khi gửi email.
Em cần chắc chắn rằng mình đã khóa cửa trước khi ra ngoài.

translation.en: I will definitely arrive on time.

notes_md:
**chắc chắn** = certain, sure, confident something is true or will happen.  

It’s an adjective and can describe a person (feeling sure) or a situation (being certain). It also works like an adverb to strengthen a statement, meaning “definitely.”  


Close synonym: **chắc** (more casual, shorter). Opposite idea: **không chắc / không chắc chắn** (not sure).
